auto.describe_the_type_of_business: Describe the type of business, the vibe you are looking for, the time of day or your target customer and our LLM will generate the perfect musical structure.
auto.e_g_relaxing_music_for_a_hipst: E.g.: 'Relaxing music for a hipster cafe downtown, young audience, rainy mornings'
auto.write_your_promotion_and_our_a: Write your promotion and our AI will generate a hyper-realistic commercial slice ready to play in your stores.
auto.e_g_attention_customers_take_a: E.g.: Attention customers, take advantage of our 20% discount in the summer accessories section...

auto.the_shield_protects_the_establ: The shield protects the establishment against inspections. It maintains an immutable log of playbacks and forces the exclusive use of Royalty-Free Mixes in case of emergency.
